method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: Stop-profile similarity is strong, but purpose mismatch and very low route similarity reduce confidence.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches; purpose does not, with moderate age/kilometer similarity.

1311.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation and purpose mismatch make this low similarity, even with good kilometer similarity and matching duty cycle.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative stop-profile correlation indicates dissimilar stop-zone behavior.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers align, but purpose does not and age similarity is modest.

1312.llm_rationale: Good stop-profile and kilometer similarity are offset by different purpose and very low route similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers align well, but purpose does not and age similarity is modest.

1350.llm_rationale: Same purpose/duty and fair kilometer similarity help, but stop-profile similarity is only moderate and route similarity is very low.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate but not strong stop-profile alignment.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; kilometers are reasonably similar, age less so.

1363.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile correlation is weakened by purpose mismatch, low route similarity, and poor kilometer similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose and kilometers do not align well.

1421.llm_rationale: Same purpose/duty and decent kilometer similarity support a moderate relation, but stop-profile and route similarity are weak-to-moderate.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; kilometers are fairly similar, age less so.

1423.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation and purpose mismatch outweigh good kilometer similarity and matching duty cycle.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative stop-profile correlation indicates dissimilar stop-zone behavior.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers align, but purpose does not and age similarity is modest.

1506.llm_rationale: No stop-profile alignment, no purpose or duty-cycle match, and weak kilometer similarity make this the least similar despite the highest route score.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Zero correlation gives no stop-profile evidence of similarity.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Highest route similarity in the set, but still low in absolute terms.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle do not match; age and kilometer similarities are weak.

1575.llm_rationale: Very high kilometer similarity and positive stop-profile correlation support some similarity, but purpose mismatch and very low route similarity keep it moderate.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers align strongly; purpose does not and age similarity is low.

1576.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile match and same purpose/duty support similarity, but route-image similarity is very low and age/kms only moderate.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Very low representative route similarity weakens behavioral match.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; age and kilometer similarity are limited.

1578.llm_rationale: Positive stop-profile match and high kilometer similarity help, but different purpose and near-zero route similarity limit similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers are similar, but purpose and age are not.

1667.llm_rationale: No stop-profile alignment, different purpose, and low route similarity indicate low behavioral similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Zero correlation provides no stop-profile support.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches and kilometers are moderate, but purpose and age similarity are weak.

1687.llm_rationale: Only modest stop-profile similarity and weak metadata match make this a low-to-moderate correlation despite matching duty cycle.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose, age, and kilometers are weakly similar.

1688.llm_rationale: Same purpose/duty cannot overcome negative stop-profile correlation and weak age/kilometer similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative stop-profile correlation indicates dissimilar stop-zone behavior.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low, though higher than many other route similarities here.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match, but age and kilometers are weakly similar.

1785.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation and very low route similarity dominate, despite same purpose/duty and moderate kilometer similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative stop-profile correlation suggests opposing stop-zone patterns.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; kilometers are moderately similar, age is low.

1993.llm_rationale: Very strong stop-profile similarity is meaningful, but different purpose, low route similarity, and weaker km/age similarity limit total behavioral correlation.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Strongest stop-profile match among the pairs.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose does not; age and kilometers are weakly similar.

2191.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile and good kilometer similarity are present, but purpose mismatch and low route similarity limit behavioral similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers align; purpose does not and age similarity is low.

2201.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile match is offset by purpose mismatch and low age/kilometer similarity; route similarity remains low.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low, though slightly higher than many other pairs.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose, age, and kilometers are weakly similar.

2518.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile similarity supports correlation, but purpose mismatch, low route similarity, and weak metadata similarity reduce it.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose does not; age and kilometers are weakly similar.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
